name: Copper Coins
description: The most basic form of currency. Common as dirt.

name: Bronze Coins
description: Worth their weight in bronze. A step up.

name: Silver Coins
description: Shiny and valuable. The mark of a tradesman.

name: Gold Coins
description: The classic standard of wealth.

name: Platinum Coins
description: Beyond gold. Only the wealthiest possess these.

name: Wood
description: Freshly cut timber. Useful for building things.

name: Earth
description: Loose earth and soil. Foundation of all construction.

name: Clay
description: Malleable clay, perfect for bricks and pottery.

name: Wheat
description: Freshly grown wheat. Not very tasty though.

name: Stone
description: Rough stone hewn from the earth. A fundamental material.

name: Iron Ore
description: Raw iron ore hewn from deep rock.

name: Coal
description: Black coal, essential fuel for smelting.

name: Fiber
description: Tough plant fibers for rope and cloth.

name: Sand
description: Fine river sand, key to glassmaking.

name: Herbs
description: Aromatic herbs with medicinal properties.

name: Leather
description: Cured animal hide, tough and versatile.

name: Fish
description: Fresh-caught fish, a reliable food source.

name: Wool
description: Fluffy wool sheared from sheep.

name: Gems
description: Rough uncut gemstones from deep rock.

name: Salt
description: Coarse mineral salt, used for preservation.

name: Bread
description: Nice smoldering bread

name: Planks
description: Smooth wooden planks, ready for construction or sale.

name: Cut Stone
description: Precisely shaped stone blocks, far more useful than raw stone.

name: Bricks
description: Sturdy fired bricks — premium construction material.

name: Iron Bars
description: Smelted iron bars, ready for forging.

name: Rope
description: Twisted fiber rope, sturdy and versatile.

name: Cloth
description: Woven cloth made from plant fiber.

name: Glass
description: Blown glass, fragile but valuable.

name: Yarn
description: Spun yarn from raw wool.

name: Ale
description: Brewed ale from grain and herbs.

name: Leather Goods
description: Handcrafted leather items and pouches.

name: Furniture
description: Quality furniture crafted from processed wood. Sells well.

name: Tools
description: Iron tools that dramatically improve work efficiency.

name: Medicine
description: Herbal remedies to keep workers healthy.

name: Gem Jewelry
description: Polished gem jewelry of great value.
